allow: PowerShell($f = Get-Item "c:\\Users\\odoke\\Downloads\\munni \(Copy\)\\munni.html"; Write-Output "Name: $\($f.Name\)"; Write-Output "Size: $\($f.Length\) bytes"; Write-Output "Modified: $\($f.LastWriteTime\)")
